title: AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS UNDER REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-THREE HUNDRED ONE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4478 / 57 OG No. 14, 2458 (April 3, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2910, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS UNDER REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-THREE HUNDRED ONE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sums appropriated under item (c), page 252 of Republic Act Numbered Twenty-three hundred and one, to wit:

"(c) Sangit-Cabatbatan Road, San Fernando................P15,000.00;"

and item (r), page 252 of the same Act, to wit:

"(r) Magtalisay-Palingpaling-Basak

Road, San Fernando..................P10,000.00;"

totalling in the amount of twenty-five thousand pesos, are hereby reappropriated for the construction of beach road in Talisay Beach, Talisay.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
